description: Navy blue backpack with an external zipped pocket and an external pouch pocket with branding on the front An external zipped pocket on the side One main zipped compartment with zipper on the side and a padded laptop compartment with velcro closure inside Haul loop and a soft padded handle for handling ease on top Padded, adjustable shoulder straps with mesh lining that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Cushioned mesh panel at the back for added comfort and breathability Warranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
